socioeconomic_indicator_rows.rationale: Higher income can increase participation in source separation (with good program design).
Higher poverty may require more free provision (bins, outreach) to sustain participation.
Can support job-creating waste programs (collection, compost operations) if designed well.
Collection/hauling and logistics capacity supports organics diversion systems.
If AD/biogas recovery is used, stable power access supports operations and monitoring.
